originalTitle: 3 Reasons AVO is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Mission Produce currently trades at $11.93 per share and has shown little upside over the past six months, posting a middling return of 3.6%. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 10.8% gain during that period.
content:
Mission Produce currently trades at $11.93 per share and has shown little upside over the past six months, posting a middling return of 3.6%. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 10.8% gain during that period.

Is there a buying opportunity in Mission Produce, or does it present a risk to your portfolio? Check out our in-depth research report to see what our analysts have to say, it’s free .

Why Do We Think Mission Produce Will Underperform?

We don't have much confidence in Mission Produce. Here are three reasons we avoid AVO and a stock we'd rather own.

1. Fewer Distribution Channels Limit its Ceiling

With $1.34 billion in revenue over the past 12 months, Mission Produce is a small consumer staples company, which sometimes brings disadvantages compared to larger competitors benefiting from economies of scale and negotiating leverage with retailers. On the bright side, it can grow faster because it has a longer list of untapped store chains to sell into.

2. Revenue Projections Show Stormy Skies Ahead

Forecasted revenues by Wall Street analysts signal a company’s potential. Predictions may not always be accurate, but accelerating growth typically boosts valuation multiples and stock prices while slowing growth does the opposite.

Over the next 12 months, sell-side analysts expect Mission Produce’s revenue to drop by 17%. This projection is underwhelming and implies its products will face some demand challenges.

3. Low Gross Margin Reveals Weak Structural Profitability

At StockStory, we prefer high gross margin businesses because they indicate pricing power or differentiated products, giving the company a chance to generate higher operating profits.

Mission Produce has bad unit economics for a consumer staples company, signaling it operates in a competitive market and lacks pricing power because its products can be substituted. As you can see below, it averaged a 12% gross margin over the last two years. That means Mission Produce paid its suppliers a lot of money ($88.05 for every $100 in revenue) to run its business.

We cheer for all companies serving everyday consumers, but in the case of Mission Produce, we’ll be cheering from the sidelines. With its shares lagging the market recently, the stock trades at 19.6× forward P/E (or $11.93 per share). This valuation tells us a lot of optimism is priced in - we think other companies feature superior fundamentals at the moment. We’d suggest looking at a dominant Aerospace business that has perfected its M&A strategy .

High-Quality Stocks for All Market Conditions

ONE MORE THING: Top 6 Stocks for This Week. This market is separating quality stocks from expensive ones fast. AI taking down whole sectors with no warning. In a rotation this fast, you need more than a list of good companies.

Our AI system flagged Palantir before it ran 1,662%. AppLovin before it ran 753%. Nvidia before it ran 1,178%. Each week it produces 6 new names that pass the same tests. Get Our Top 6 Stocks for Free HERE .

Stocks that have made our list include now familiar names such as Nvidia (+1,326% between June 2020 and June 2025) as well as under-the-radar businesses like the once-small-cap company Comfort Systems (+782% five-year return). Find your next big winner with StockStory today .
chineseTitle: AVO 有风险的 3 个原因和 1 只值得买入的股票
chineseSummary: Mission Produce 目前的交易价格为每股 11.93 美元，过去六个月几乎没有上涨空间，回报率中等，为 3.6%。该股同期涨幅也低于标准普尔 500 指数 10.8% 的涨幅。
chineseContent:
Mission Produce 目前的交易价格为每股 11.93 美元，过去六个月几乎没有上涨空间，回报率中等，为 3.6%。该股同期涨幅也低于标准普尔 500 指数 10.8% 的涨幅。

Mission Produce 是否存在购买机会，或者是否会给您的投资组合带来风险？查看我们的深入研究报告，看看我们的分析师怎么说，它是免费的。

为什么我们认为《使命制作》会表现不佳？

我们对 Mission Produce 没有太大信心。以下是我们避开 AVO 和我们宁愿持有的股票的三个原因。

1. 分销渠道较少限制了其上限

Mission Produce 是一家小型消费必需品公司，过去 12 个月的收入为 13.4 亿美元，与受益于规模经济和与零售商谈判筹码的大型竞争对手相比，这有时会带来劣势。从好的方面来说，它可以增长得更快，因为它有更多未开发的连锁店可供销售。

2. 收入预测显示未来风雨飘摇

华尔街分析师预测的收入表明了公司的潜力。预测可能并不总是准确的，但加速增长通常会推高估值倍数和股价，而放缓增长则相反。

卖方分析师预计 Mission Produce 的收入在未来 12 个月内将下降 17%。这一预测并不令人印象深刻，意味着其产品将面临一些需求挑战。

3、低毛利率揭示结构性盈利能力薄弱

在StockStory，我们更喜欢高毛利率的业务，因为它们表明定价能力或差异化产品，使公司有机会产生更高的营业利润。

对于一家消费必需品公司来说，Mission Produce 的单位经济效益很差，这表明该公司在竞争激烈的市场中运营，并且由于其产品可以被替代而缺乏定价能力。如下所示，过去两年的平均毛利率为 12%。这意味着 Mission Produce 向供应商支付了大量资金（每 100 美元收入 88.05 美元）来运营其业务。

我们为所有为日常消费者提供服务的公司欢呼，但就 Mission Produce 而言，我们将在场外欢呼。由于其股价最近落后于市场，该股的预期市盈率为 19.6 倍（即每股 11.93 美元）。这一估值告诉我们，定价中包含了很多乐观情绪——我们认为其他公司目前拥有优越的基本面。我们建议关注已完善并购策略的占主导地位的航空航天企业。

适合所有市场条件的优质股票

还有一件事：本周排名前 6 的股票。这个市场正在快速地将优质股票与昂贵股票分开。人工智能在没有任何警告的情况下摧毁了整个行业。在如此快速的轮换中，您需要的不仅仅是一份优秀公司的名单。

我们的 AI 系统在 Palantir 运行 1,662% 之前对其进行了标记。 AppLovin之前的运行率为753%。此前英伟达的股价为 1,178%。每周都会产生 6 个通过相同测试的新名字。在此免费获取我们的前 6 名股票。

进入我们名单的股票包括现在熟悉的名字，如 Nvidia（2020 年 6 月至 2025 年 6 月期间增长 1,326%），以及曾经不为人知的企业，如曾经的小盘股公司 Comfort Systems（五年回报率增长 782%）。立即通过 StockStory 寻找您的下一个大赢家。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
